description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, open layout and a flat roof. The front features a prominent entryway with a staircase flanked by two symmetrical trees and small shrubs, leading to a covered porch area. Large windows are distributed across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces, and the rear includes a spacious patio area with outdoor seating. The structure is surrounded by landscaped greenery, including several mature trees and manicured bushes, enhancing its curb appeal. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, likely stucco or painted concrete, with clean, geometric lines. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped surroundings, featuring a prominent front entry and rear patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, staircase, symmetrical trees, and covered porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the building, side windows, and landscaping along the pathway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area, outdoor seating, and large windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible side entrance, additional landscaping, and rear patio access.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
